installation.title: Installation & Setup
installation.subtitle: Through this guide, you'll learn how to install and configure DeepTrans Studio development environment.

prerequisites.title: Prerequisites
prerequisites.description: Before installing DeepTrans Studio, please ensure the following tools are installed:
items: Node.js ≥ 18.18 (recommended to use corepack to manage Yarn 1.22.22)
Docker / Docker Compose (for local dependency services or one-click deployment)

installDeps.title: Install Dependencies
installDeps.description: Use corepack to manage Yarn, then install project dependencies.

envConfig.title: Configure Environment Variables
envConfig.description: Copy or create .env.local and fill in according to your actual environment:
envConfig.note: 💡 For production, use Tencent COS for object storage, PostgreSQL 18 with pgvector/PGroonga for memory search, Valkey for queues, and MinerU online parsing for PDFs.
envConfig.example:
# Database & Cache
DATABASE_URL="postgresql://postgres:123456@localhost:5432/deeptrans"
REDIS_URL="redis://valkey:6379"

# Authentication & Site Config
AUTH_SECRET="Please generate a random string"
NEXTAUTH_URL="http://localhost:3000"
NODE_ENV=development

# LLM / AI Services
OPENAI_API_KEY="sk-xxxx"
OPENAI_BASE_URL="https://api.openai.com/v1"
OPENAI_API_MODEL="gpt-4o-mini"

# Dedicated chat/translation LLM config
# LLM_API_KEY="sk-xxxx"
# LLM_BASE_URL="https://api.openai.com/v1"
# LLM_MODEL="gpt-4o-mini"

# Embedding provider
OPENAI_EMBED_MODEL=doubao-embedding-text-240715
# EMBEDDING_API_KEY="sk-xxxx"
# EMBEDDING_BASE_URL="https://api.openai.com/v1"
# EMBEDDING_API_PATH="/embeddings"
# EMBEDDING_MODEL="doubao-embedding-text-240715"
# EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS=

# MinerU online PDF parser
MINERU_API_MODE=agent
MINERU_AGENT_BASE_URL=https://mineru.net/api/v1/agent
MINERU_API_BASE_URL=https://mineru.net/api/v4
# MINERU_API_TOKEN="token-for-standard-or-precise-mode"
MINERU_MODEL_VERSION=vlm
MINERU_LANGUAGE=ch
MINERU_IS_OCR=false
MINERU_ENABLE_TABLE=true
MINERU_ENABLE_FORMULA=true
MINERU_TIMEOUT_MS=300000
MINERU_POLL_INTERVAL_MS=3000
# MINERU_PAGE_RANGE=1-20
# MINERU_DISABLE=false

# Object Storage
# Development: MinIO
STORAGE_TYPE=minio
STORAGE_ENDPOINT=localhost
STORAGE_PORT=9000
STORAGE_USE_SSL=false
STORAGE_ACCESS_KEY=minioadmin
STORAGE_SECRET_KEY=minioadmin
STORAGE_BUCKET=deeptrans

# Production: Tencent COS
# STORAGE_TYPE=cos
# COS_SECRET_ID=AKIDxxxxxxxx
# COS_SECRET_KEY=xxxxxxxx
# COS_BUCKET=deeptrans-1250000000
# COS_REGION=ap-guangzhou

# Other Services
STUDIO_HOST=localhost        # Used for Traefik/HTTPS deployment

# Optional: SMTP, pgvector access info, etc.
# EMAIL_SERVER=smtps://deeptrans_studio%40163.com:<your-163-authorization-code>@smtp.163.com:465
# EMAIL_FROM="DeepTrans Studio <deeptrans_studio@163.com>"

initDb.title: Initialize Database
initDb.description: Execute database migrations and generate Prisma Client.

commands.migrate: yarn prisma migrate deploy      # or yarn db:push to initialize structure
commands.generate: yarn prisma generate            # Generate Prisma Client
commands.seed: yarn db:seed                    # Optional: Import sample data

startDev.title: Start Local Development Environment
startDev.description: Start dependency services and run the Next.js development server.

step1.title: Start Dependency Services
step1.description: Recommended to use services from Docker Compose:
step1.command:
docker compose up -d db valkey minio
# Development uses MinIO locally. Production uses Tencent COS and does not start MinIO.

step2.title: Start Next.js Application
step2.description: Start the development server (with hot reload):

step3.title: Start Worker Service (Optional)
step3.description: If you want to run Worker in local Node environment, execute:
step3.note: In Docker Compose, the equivalent service is app_worker.

access.title: Access Application
access.description: Visit http://localhost:3000 to access Studio; Prisma Studio can be started with `yarn db:studio`.

dockerCompose.title: Run with Docker Compose
dockerCompose.description: Deploy all services with Docker Compose in one command.

step1.title: Prepare Environment Variables
step1.description: Prepare .env / .env.production and ensure STUDIO_HOST points to the external domain.

step3.title: Start Main Services
step3.command: docker compose up -d traefik app app_worker db valkey
step3.note: Traefik will map ports 80/443 to Studio. Prisma Studio can be started as needed.
